title: Wacky Pack
description: This project is a CrazyCraft like modpack that is filled with new and updating features. We want this modpack filled to the brim with the wackiest and funniest mods.
body:
Have you ever wanted a decently good modpack, but kinda crazy at the same time? If you download this modpack, you will be stunned by how many wacky things happen! If you want to add anything, you can use the form [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScxGchvSS3scEY2g3q64XvJ-un1lPAe9Btc3vFWszi8WAYhoQ/viewform?usp=header).



This is a CrazyCraft inspired modpack that aims to add weird and new features to the game!
